text: I feel displaced and slightly disoriented by the tilted perspective of the scene. The emptiness and clean lines of the open hall evoke a sense of sterile anticipation, as though something is about to happen or be revealed. Moving into the next space with bright, patterned walls and the allure of "R+D" fills me with curiosity and an urge to explore—there’s a palpable energy here, a promise of discovery and innovation. Yet, beneath it all, I am reminded of how environment shapes thought: from the void of the hall to the spectacle of display, I shift from introspection to a stimulated engagement with the world’s unfolding ideas.
